variants.title: HiFi Filter SA 14916 Air Filter
variants.description: Genuine HiFi Filter SA 14916 Air Filter. Easy to install and replace, the SA 14916 is built to withstand demanding environments, offering long-lasting protection and reliability. Whether used in automotive, agricultural, construction, or industrial applications, this filter is an essential component for maintaining system health and performance.
specifications: Style: AIR FILTER, Dimension 1 (D1): 87.0 mm, Dimension 2 (D2): 32.0 mm, Dimension 3 (D3): 25.0 mm, Height 1 (H1): 130.0 mm, Height 2 (H2): 110.0 mm

variants.title: Donaldson P500235 Breather, Air | Replaces the HiFi Filter SA 14916
variants.option1Value: Donaldson P500235 Breather, Air | Replaces the HiFi Filter SA 14916
variants.description: Genuine Donaldson P500235 Breather, Air is engineered to deliver reliable performance and durability across a wide range of applications. Designed with high-quality materials, it ensures consistent functionality while meeting demanding operational requirements. Whether used in industrial, automotive, or heavy-duty settings, this component offers dependable operation and longevity. Its versatile design makes it suitable for various uses, supporting system efficiency and overall performance.

variants.title: Fleetguard AF4966 Crankcase Breather | Replaces the HiFi Filter SA 14916
variants.option1Value: Fleetguard AF4966 Crankcase Breather | Replaces the HiFi Filter SA 14916
variants.description: ​Fleetguard® AF4966 air filter is installed in front of the carburetor or intake pipe to remove dust and sand in the air and ensure sufficient and clean air in the cylinder.
